title: Public Education Program. The Department shall undertake a
content: 8 comprehensive and integrated public education program on overseas employment 9 involving seafarers, LMAs, principals/employers and government personnel, for the 10 purpose of promoting safe and legal migration and preventing illegal recruitment and 11 trafficking in persons. 12 13
